resources.string: Design a system for uploading images during a session
Explore Room DB concepts: @Embedded, TypeConverter, one-to-many @Relation, many-to-many join table, @Transaction queries
Design a login screen with rotation support of screen.
Design a note application with CRUD operations and local database persistence
WorkManager + mediaProcessing foreground service. Single orchestrator, DB-checkpointed chunked uploads, concurrency-limited via Semaphore, batch associate on completion.

JobScheduler.setUserInitiated(true) — API 34+ jobs enforced to start within a user-gesture window. Appear in Task Manager instead of the notification shade. Falls back to WorkManager Expedited + DATA_SYNC FGS on API < 34.
Learn Android cryptography: secure network decryption, encrypted local storage with Keystore and Tink, and hybrid-encrypted payloads for server communication
5 IPC mechanisms: Explicit Intent, Broadcast, ContentProvider, Messenger, AIDL. Signature-level permissions protect every channel. Install both APK flavors to see it in action.
Understand GraphQL in detail: queries, variables, inline fragments, and cursor-based pagination — all against the real GitHub API using a Personal Access Token.
Full-page video with Widevine DRM, DASH adaptive streaming, seek bar, play/pause and mute controls using Media3 ExoPlayer.
Real-time Bitcoin/USDT ticker streamed via WebSocket from the Binance public API. Demonstrates persistent bidirectional connections with OkHttp.
Stream real-time Wikipedia edits using Server-Sent Events (SSE) from the Wikimedia EventStreams public API. One-way server push over HTTP.
Chat with the classic ELIZA AI over gRPC using Protocol Buffers. Connects to the public ConnectRPC demo server over HTTP/2 with TLS.
MVI + Clean Architecture + Strategy pattern (Minimax AI) + State machine + Room DB history. Player vs Player or Player vs AI.
Interactive comparison of StateFlow, SharedFlow, LiveData, and Channel. See how each reactive primitive behaves: replay, caching, lifecycle-awareness, and backpressure.
Understand how annotations work at compile time. Explore the KSP pipeline with a real custom @AutoToString processor that generates Kotlin code.
Detect device tier (LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH) from RAM and CPU cores. Simulate any device profile with sliders and see the adaptive UI respond live.
